mapper.select: merge into transcriber t using ( values (#{input.id}::bigint, #{input.name}::text) ) as s(id, name) on (t.id = s.id) or (t.name = s.name) when matched then update set name = coalesce(s.name, t.name) when not matched then insert (name) values (s.name) returning t.id, t.name, merge_action() as action
select id, name, null as action from transcriber where id = #{id}
